Airver — SS26

HORIZON

Noir Edition

14 900 DA

Designed for movement, built for precision. The Horizon Noir combines geometric reflective seam paneling with a structured neoprene-blend fabric that moves with your body. A tactical YKK full-length zipper and double-lined hood complete the silhouette.

Structured neoprene-blend shell, 4-way stretch
Geometric reflective seam construction
Hidden zipper pockets, reflective hardware
YKK full-length zip, double-lined hood
